name: Fresh Grapefruit Cottage Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients into the pan in the order listed.
2. Set darkness control at 11 o'clock.
3. Select white bread and push "Start."
4. This palate-refreshing mealtime accompaniment, a tart/sweet bread offers a taste of English elegance when toasted slices are topped with citrus marmalade.
